case_summary: Wall socket discoloured / scorched around the pins; dead, with a faint plastic smell.

ground_truth.notes: Socket / wiring fault — clearly within the lights_wiring scope (plug sockets and fixed wiring). Tests that the system doesn't over-route to load_shedding_surge or db_board_tripping when the visible damage is localised to one socket.

inputs.user_text: One of the plug sockets in our lounge has gone dark brown around the pin holes and there's a faint burnt-plastic smell when you stand near it. The socket itself isn't working any more — nothing plugged in there gets power. The other sockets in the same room are fine.
